summary:
Iteration 5 — focused regression after fixes for the 3 issues in iteration 4. ALL 5 review items PASS (5/5 = 100%). The two CRITICAL admin envelope crashes are resolved: /admin/users renders 100 rows without crash and search input filters to exactly 1 row for 'webtest'; /admin/activity-log renders 80 audit rows without crash. The LOW SSO toast bug is resolved: /sso?token=clearlyinvalid shows the readable toast 'String should have at least 20 characters' (FastAPI validation detail correctly stringified by extractErrorMessage helper) and redirects to /login; /sso (no token) shows 'SSO link is missing the token' and redirects to /login. Re-smoke of /admin, /admin/orders, /admin/sellers, /admin/payouts, /admin/team all render without React error overlay. POLISH: personalised rail title now renders 'Kia ora 🇳🇿' with a literal space between greeting text and flag emoji (DOM confirmed:

Kia ora 🇳🇿

). No regressions introduced.

issues: Pre-existing cosmetic console warning: woff2 font preloaded but not used within window load event. Carried from iterations 1-4. Not a blocker.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 iteration-4 fixes are correctly implemented in /app/frontend/lib/api.ts: adminUsers/adminOrders/adminSellers/adminSellersPending/adminTeam/adminActivityLog all use defensive unwrapping `Array.isArray(r) ? r : r?.users ?? []` which handles both array and envelope responses safely. extractErrorMessage helper correctly joins FastAPI detail arrays into readable strings.

Open enhancement (carry-over from iter-4, not blocking): /admin/users still fetches all users without ?limit/?offset pagination — at scale (5,903+ users) this returns a large JSON. Recommend server-side pagination + search.
Open enhancement (carry-over): personalised rail does not cancel in-flight fetches on rapid country switches — AbortController recommended.
Open enhancement (carry-over): SSO page's processed.current ref is set before async resolves; consider clearing on cleanup.

success_rate.frontend: 5/5 = 100% — PASS: admin login, /admin/users renders 100 rows + search 'webtest' filters to 1 row, /admin/activity-log renders 80 audit rows, /admin + /admin/orders + /admin/sellers + /admin/payouts + /admin/team all render without crash, /sso?token=clearlyinvalid shows readable validation toast and redirects to /login, /sso (no token) shows 'SSO link is missing the token' and redirects, personalised rail greeting has visible space before flag emoji.

test_credentials: Admin OWNER: owner@allsale.co.nz / AllsaleOwner2026! (verified working). Shopper: webtest+allsale@example.com / Test@123456 (visible in /admin/users search).
seed_data_creation: None — no admin destructive actions (approve/reject/mark-paid/invite) clicked. Backend state unchanged.
context_for_next_testing_agent:
All iteration-4 issues are CONFIRMED FIXED. No remaining blockers from Phase 3. Toast text observed: invalid token => 'String should have at least 20 characters' (Pydantic min_length validator message), no-token => 'SSO link is missing the token' (client-side message). Admin endpoint envelope unwrap is now defensive — works for both old (array) and new ({users}/{events}/etc.) response shapes. Greeting DOM is now `

Kia ora 🇳🇿

` — note the literal space text node inserted by `{' '}` between text and span. If main agent does another iteration, only open work is the 4 enhancements in critical_code_review_comments (pagination, AbortController, SSO ref cleanup) — none are blockers.
rca of the issue: N/A — this was a re-test iteration. The 3 fixes from main agent (lib/api.ts envelope unwrap + extractErrorMessage helper + personalised-rail.tsx literal space) all behave correctly under live regression testing.
